---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# adiabatic_evolution

## Create ops 

```{julia}
include("./04_workflow/adiabatic_evolution/src/op_creator.jl")
```

```{julia}
# H
qubit_num = 8
p = (T = 1,)
H = create_ssh_H(qubit_num, p);
```

```{julia}
# magnet quantity
Mz = create_magnet_quantity(qubit_num);
```

## spectrum

```{julia}
include("./04_workflow/adiabatic_evolution/src/eigen_calculator.jl")
dt = 0.01
tlist = range(0, p.T; step = dt)
Es, eigen_states, Mz_ground_vals = get_eigen(H, p, tlist, Mz; energy_num=20);
Mz_ground_vals[end-2:end]
```

## evolution

```{julia}
ψ0 = eigen_states[:, 1, 1];
qubit_dims = ntuple(_ -> 2, qubit_num);
ψ0 = Qobj(ψ0; type = Ket(), dims = qubit_dims);
sol = sesolve(H, ψ0, tlist; params = p, e_ops = [Mz], saveat = tlist,);
```

```{julia}
# 检验
# initial states are equal.
ψ0 == sol.states[1]
norm(dot(ψ0, sol.states[1]))
# get the vals of Mz
Mzt_vals = real(sol.expect[1, :]);
```
